examples: Stumper a stumper. A knotty problem.

For Claire Sulmers, a 27-year-old fashion blogger in New York, the stumper was an 'international' dress code.
And the Somerset stumper continued his rich vein of form in the short form of the game in the Caribbean, scoring 222 runs in seven matches including 11 sixes.
Alas, even that was a stumper.
